name: BackendForge: Benchmarking Agentic End-to-End Code Generation with Backend Services

description: arXiv:2607.11042v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used in agentic coding settings, where they can inspect files, execute commands, run tests, observe failures, and iteratively revise code. This shift raises a central evaluation question: can an agentic LLM generate an end-to-end software artifact that is both deployable and behaviorally correct unde...
author: Yuzhe Guo, Mengzhou Wu, Yuan Cao, Jialei Wei, Dezhi Ran, Wei Yang, Tao Xie
